title: Sonsonate Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Sonsonate, with a Z-Score of +4.11. This event is extremely rare and poses significant risks.
body:
The current heat wave in Sonsonate is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a CDD of 13.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 61%, and the wind speed is 8.1 km/h, which can exacerbate the heat-related issues. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling and mitigating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the population and infrastructure.
